titleStmt.title: SII 22.80: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 80. (A.R. No. 80 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. PAR. RĀJENDRADĒVA—3rd YEAR (A.D. 1054-55)

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Tirumaruviya Śeṅgōlvēndan etc. This records a gift of 32 kāśu in memory of a lady by name Śēndaṉ Umaiyāḷ, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tāntoṉṟi-Mahādēvar at Vāḷaiyūr alias Rājēndrapuram by Malaiyamāṉ Kāṭṭimēlūruḍaiyāṉ Paḻaṅkūṟaṉ Kuṉṟaṉ of Kūgūrppāḍi in Narippaḷḷi-nāḍu on the southern bank. The gift is said to be in response to a demand made by the community Nāṉgudiśai Padineṇbhūmi Nānādēśi who held him responsible for the suicide of that lady by poison because of some threat held out by him with regard to a tax due.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaruviya ceṅkolventaṉ muṉṉoṉ ceṉai piṉṉatu vāka Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum koṇṭu kol
lāpurattu cayattampamnāṭṭi muṉṉāṇai tavirttu taṉṉāṇai celutti Etiramar peṟātu Eṇṭicai nikaḻa paṟaiya
tu kaṟaṅka Āṅkatu keṭṭu perāṟṟaṅkarai koppattu vantetirporuta Āhavamallaṉ Añci puṟaṅkiṭṭoṭa Ā
ṉaiyuṅ kutiraiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum Āṅkavaṉ vipavam Aṭaṅkaluṅ koṇṭu vijaiya Apiṣekam cey
tu viraciṅkācaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripatmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra devaṟku yāṇṭu 3vatu vāṇakoppāṭiyāṉa rā
jentravaḷanāṭṭu peṇṇait teṉkarai narippaḷḷināṭṭu kūkurppāṭi yirukkum malaiyamāṉ kāṭṭimelūruṭaiyāṉ paḻaṅkūraṉ ku
ṉṟaṉ meṟpaṭiyūrirukkum virarputtiraṉ tāy centaṉ Umaiyāḷai Iṟaikāṭṭa Avaḷ Iṟaikaṭaveṉalleṉeṉṟu colla Avaḷai
kocceyvikka Avaḷ nañcu kuṭittu cāva nāṉku ticai patiṉeṇpūmi nānāteciyum kūṭa niraintu Inta paḻaṅkūraṉ kuṉṟaṉmel pa
ḻiyākki Ivaṉme linta paḻitira koṇṭa naṭaiyāvatu vāḷaiyūrākiya rājentrapurattu tiruttāṉtoṉṟi mātevarkku tirununtāviḷak
koṉṟu vaikkakkaṭavaṉākki Ivaṉ vaitta kācu muppattiraṇṭu Ikkācu muppattiraṇṭu vāḷaiyūrākiya rājentrapurattu nakarattom koṇṭo
m koṇṭu Arumoḻitevaṉ marakkāloṭu Okkum Uḻakkāl nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇai Aṭṭakaṭavom Ivveṇṇai vaṇikkirāmattom
Irukūṟum caṅkarappāṭiyom Orukūṟum cantirātittaval Itu paṉmāheśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
